original_image_tags: The top of the page features two punch holes for binding.

elements.description: A faintly visible, double-exposed or bleed-through typed document. Stamps are visible at the bottom: a blue stamp reading 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE FBI RECEIVED-MAIL ROOM Aug 2 4:42 P.M. 47' and a red stamp reading 'RECORDS-REGISTRATION DIVISION MAILED AUG 3 1947 P.M.'. Two black circular holes are at the top edge. No clear photographs, sketches, or diagrams are visible.

judge.reason: Description A mentions only punch holes while Description B describes stamps with specific text and a bleed-through document, indicating the descriptions are about different visual content or one hallucinates elements the other does not see.
